title: State Leaves Students with Substantially Inferior Education

violations.summary: State's education funding and resource allocation leaves students in low-income rural districts with substantially inferior education on the basis of geographic location and income, in violation of Article XVIII Section 2.2.

satisfied_duties.duty: require the state to adopt a lawful remedy within a defined period sufficient to restore the constitutional education floor for the affected students
satisfied_duties.outcome: required the state to adopt a constitutionally sufficient remedy for the education floor violation within one year and retained jurisdiction to review adequacy

ai_summary.primary_violation: State's education funding and resource allocation leaves students in low-income rural districts with substantially inferior education on the basis of geographic location and income, in violation of Article XVIII Section 2.2.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
